Backend & Cloud Engineer | AI & Data Engineering

About Me

I am a backend, cloud, and AI-focused engineer with a Master of Science in Data Science, Analytics & Engineering from Arizona State University. I currently work on production-grade AWS serverless systems at MindSpark, with hands-on experience across AWS Lambda, API Gateway, Aurora PostgreSQL, RDS Data API, AppConfig, LangChain RAG pipelines, and machine learning.

~95%

Lambda Latency Reduction

Resolved a 25–30s production latency spike through lazy-init AppConfig caching and elimination of dead SQL joins, cutting response time to 150–200ms.

4×

ACU Cost Spike Diagnosed

Traced a $3→$12/day Aurora Serverless cost spike to an unfiltered Lambda polling loop; coordinated evidence-backed fixes across four engineering teams.

41M+

Records Processed

Built a serverless AWS data pipeline for NYC taxi mobility analytics with XGBoost modeling and Power BI observability dashboards.

97.8%

LSTM Forecast Accuracy

Developed an energy consumption forecasting model on 1M+ hourly records with strong time-series performance.

Professional Experience

AWS Cloud Developer Intern — MindSpark

Mesa, AZ | February 2026 – Present

  • Built and maintained the core database gateway (RDS-Processing Lambda) for the Kairos platform — dynamic SQL, type-safe RDS Data API parameters, referential integrity across 21 tables; added per-caller metadata layer for Aurora cycle tracing and cost attribution.
  • Diagnosed a 4× Aurora Serverless ACU cost spike ($3→$12/day) via CloudWatch Database Insights — traced to a background Lambda polling Aurora 24/7 with unfiltered SELECT * and a batch system generating sustained write load; coordinated evidence-backed fixes across four engineering teams and authored a 5-chapter engineering certification course with graded assessments and runbooks.
  • Diagnosed & resolved a 25–30s production latency spike — traced to Aurora auto-pause delays and blocking AppConfig initialization; refactored to lazy-init caching and eliminated dead SQL joins, cutting response time to 150–200ms (~95% reduction).
  • Designed multi-table transactions with automatic rollback, partial-update safety, and stepped retry backoff for Aurora cold starts; implemented client-side UUID pre-generation for FK dependency chains achieving zero data-integrity violations in production.
  • Managed staged deployment (dev → staging → prod) via Lambda versioning with weekly ACU health monitoring.

Software Engineer Trainee — Cognizant

Bengaluru, India | November 2022 – July 2023

  • Completed an intensive 8-month enterprise Java Full Stack training program covering Spring Boot, Angular, RESTful APIs, SQL, microservices, and AWS architecture; maintained a 95% average across 20+ assessments.
  • Built 3 capstone projects simulating enterprise healthcare systems — microservices decomposition, relational schema design, REST API contracts, and end-to-end integration testing.

Featured Projects

Selected projects across cloud engineering, RAG/LLM pipelines, data engineering, machine learning, computer vision, and business intelligence.

RAG Document QA Pipeline

Built an end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation pipeline for multi-document question answering with confidence-filtered retrieval and LLM-powered answer generation.

  • PDF ingestion (PyMuPDF), recursive chunking, and sentence-transformer embeddings.
  • Dual vector store architecture (FAISS + ChromaDB) with score thresholding and top-k filtering.
  • LangChain orchestration with context window management and source attribution.
LangChain FAISS ChromaDB Groq LLM Python

Urban Mobility Data Pipeline

Built an end-to-end AWS serverless data pipeline processing 41M+ NYC taxi records with weather enrichment, automated validation, feature engineering, and Power BI observability.

  • XGBoost model achieving R² = 0.90 (30% improvement over baseline).
  • Engineered 58+ temporal, spatial, and weather features.
  • Power BI dashboards tracked 12+ KPIs across 265 city zones.
AWS Lambda S3 DynamoDB XGBoost Power BI

Energy Consumption Forecasting

Built a time-series forecasting pipeline on 1M+ hourly energy records with weather integration and model comparison across classical ML and deep learning methods.

  • LSTM and Random Forest models achieving 97.8% accuracy (18% improvement over baseline).
  • End-to-end ML pipeline: preprocessing, sliding-window feature generation, cross-validation, and anomaly detection.
  • Tableau dashboards projected ~$50K/year in operational cost savings.
LSTM TensorFlow Scikit-learn Tableau

Human Emotion Recognition System

Developed a real-time multimodal emotion recognition system combining facial image classification and audio emotion detection, optimized for healthcare and HCI use cases.

  • Fine-tuned VGG16 transfer learning model with 86.3% accuracy (12% improvement).
  • Built Bi-LSTM audio emotion detection using MFCC, ZCR, and RMSE features.
  • Integrated OpenCV live video and microphone-based audio inference.
VGG16 CNN Bi-LSTM OpenCV

Indian Sign Language Recognition — Published

Published real-time Indian Sign Language interpreter using hand landmark extraction, sequence modeling, and gesture-to-text translation.

  • Achieved 97% accuracy across varied lighting and backgrounds.
  • Built end-to-end OpenCV, MediaPipe, and LSTM pipeline.
  • Published in IJRTI, Volume 7, Issue 6, 2022.
OpenCV MediaPipe LSTM TensorFlow
